body_txt: A ranged weapon integrated within the character's buttocks. Often used as a surprise attack. Sub-Trope of Joke of the Butt . Compare Shoulder Cannon , Leg Cannon , Arm Cannon , Chest Blaster , and Torpedo Tits . See also Ass Kicks You , Tail Slap , Beware My Stinger Tail . Not to be confused with Fartillery .
